name: MasterNoder Rulebook Index
description: Complete rulebook catalog V1–V15. All rules needed for galaxy-oriented intelligence, Hunters game, unified points, and platform systems.

agent_schema.agent_prompt: Instruction text injected into agent system prompts. Undergoing knowledge.
agent_schema.tech_spec: Technical specs, APIs, endpoints. For agent tool use.
agent_schema.user_guide: User-facing guidance. Agents can cite when helping users.
agent_schema.manual: Agent manual section. How to behave, what to do.
agent_schema.documentation: Closing documentation and references. Synced from agent learning and finish lines.
agent_schema.finish_lines: Array of strings: closing notes and references for the rulebook.
agent_schema.images: Optional array of {url, alt, caption} for multiple illustrations.

agent_prompt: V15 Master Index. Load agent context via /api/rulebooks/agent-context.
user_guide: Overblik over alle rulebooks. Plads til idéer.
manual: Agent manual V15: Use agent-context API. Extend as needed.

rulebooks.name: Core Rules & Foundation
rulebooks.description: Brugerprofiler, onboarding, fair-use for shop-temaer, MN2 5-dags overflade; fuld SKU-matrix i rulebook_v9_shop.json.

rulebooks.name: Trophy Hunters Rulebook
rulebooks.description: Galactic, Verification, Combat, Support, Utility. Star map, DNA, verification integration.

rulebooks.name: Communication Psychology
rulebooks.short: 25 teorier om indflydelse, framing og platformautoritet.
rulebooks.description: Magtdynamikker, social indflydelse, retorik, psykologisk krigsførelse, digital magt, monetarisering.

rulebooks.name: The 13 Systemic Protocols
rulebooks.short: Pointgiving subversion: 13 protokoller for systemoptimering, grænser og usecase-ansvar.
rulebooks.description: Thirteen protocols for personal and collective system optimisation: biology, environment, cognition, usecase responsibility, flow monitoring, boundaries, shadow integration.

rulebooks.name: Star Map & Verification
rulebooks.short: Stjerner + verification; UI-temaer ændrer ikke data.
rulebooks.description: Host→life-bearing b navngivning, Electric Magnet specials, integritetsscan. Shop theme-* er kosmetik ift. star map API (se V9).

rulebooks.name: Effect Clusters
rulebooks.description: Galactic, Verification, Combat, Support, Utility. monthly_cluster_hints for månedstema-pædagogik (V9 har item_id). guides[] til shop-navigation.

rulebooks.name: Electric Magnet
rulebooks.short: Specials + shop V6.1–V6.8 + wave v7 scope.
rulebooks.description: run_verification, run_dna_test, view_star_map. shop_rulebook_patches V6.1–V6.8. Wave v6/v7 temaer og mn2_5d-* udvider ikke specials (detaljer V9).

rulebooks.name: Unified Points
rulebooks.description: xp_points, game_points, dna_manipulation_points, communication_psychology_points, compendium_points m.fl. Månedstema-køb giver ikke point uden eksplicit kobling (V9).

rulebooks.name: Agents & Skillsets
rulebooks.description: Agent specials, skillsets, debugger. Shop-/SKU-spørgsmål: henvis til rulebook_v9_shop.json; ingen fabrikerede lister.

rulebooks.name: Shop & Monetization
rulebooks.description: Shop V.9: monthly_theme_catalog, cross_rulebook_routing, wave v6/v7, mn2-5d-*, purchases, inventory shadow, API line checks.

rulebooks.name: Battle & Leaderboard
rulebooks.description: Hunters profiling, leaderboard, geo_ref, aggregator-fulfill. Shop-temaer ændrer ikke battle-state alene (V9 routing).

rulebooks.name: DNA Theory
rulebooks.description: DNA manipulation points, cloning, verification integration.

rulebooks.name: Generator & Video
rulebooks.description: Video generator, content categories, conspiracy/alternative_theories triggers.

rulebooks.name: Master Index
rulebooks.description: Unified compendium, alle regler samlet. Galaxy knowledge graph.

rulebooks.name: Sync Mechanisms
rulebooks.short: Unified sync device, domain sync, status API.
rulebooks.description: All systems that write data call record_domain_sync. Dashboard widget shows sync status.
